meta.name: Renewal Risk Alerter
meta.description: Identify accounts whose contracts are expiring in the next 60 days and who show low health scores. Alert the CS team with a prioritized renewal risk list.

parameters.content:
## 39 — Renewal Risk Alerter

**Required:**
- RENEWALS_SHEET_ID: columns customer_id, company, segment, mrr, contract_end_date, health_score, csm_owner
- RENEWAL_WINDOW_DAYS: days ahead to look (default: 60)
- RENEWAL_HEALTH_THRESHOLD: health score below which to flag (default: 70)
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Monday at 08:30
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🔔 Renewal Risk {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.total_expiring }} accounts in {{ $json.window_days }}d | ${{ $json.total_mrr_at_risk }} at-risk MRR
